calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory Solimine in Propria Persona. Joseph DiGiacomo, Jr. in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it has the declarations, asked about the requirements of the local authorities and asked if they had submitted declarations stating that they complied with the rules of Mexico. Mr. Solimine stated that they had not submitted a declaration. The Court stated that it will give them a chance to file a declaration listing what the requirements of Mexico are, that all of the requirements were complied with and how they were complied with. The Court took Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage under submission as of September 21, 2016.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)
